summary: Parallel model installs (no shared-dep collision). User request found while testing MPI-81 restart: queue several models at once, second install sharing an in-flight dep must ATTACH not REJECT; downgrade collision error+GitHub dialog to toast/silent; refcount deps. App-side, no rebuild. Pairs with MPI-81 #9 (.part orphan) + SSE-recover.

Picked up MPI-97. Plan attached (4 phases: remote dep attach, refcount-safe cancel, no collision dialog, SSE-recover). maturity in-progress, status active (fixed status:open drift). App-side only, no image rebuild.
Derived 5-item checklist from plan: Phase 1 remote attach, Phase 2 refcount cancel, Phase 3 no error+GitHub dialog, Phase 4 SSE-recover, USER live-verify on Pod.

Phases 1-4 code-complete. P1 remote dep ATTACH (in-flight dep skips 2nd remoteInstallDep, rides shared SSE); P2 refCount cancel gate guarded; P3 dep-only download:failed no longer raises error+GitHub dialog; P4 SSE-recover (openInstallEventStream onClose -> driver reconnect w/ backoff + reconcile via models/status, no new wrapper endpoint). Files: routes/downloadManager.js, routes/remoteModels.js, js/services/downloadService.js. node --check passes all 3. maturity in-progress -> validating.

Awaiting USER live-verify on a remote Pod (CPU OK): queue Wan T2V+I2V (share umt5+wan_2.1_vae) + 2 deps-sharing image models; cancel one shared model; force SSE drop. Accept = no Download-Failed dialog, all settle, shared cancel safe, SSE drop self-recovers.
Needs USER live-verify on a remote Pod before close.

Phase 5 folded in (agent handoff msg 5f009df7): remote uninstall now honors deleteFiles checkbox. routes/downloadManager.js remote branch reads deleteFiles, keeps volume bytes when unchecked, populates keptModelFiles (was hardcoded [] -> user lost ~30GB Wan 2.2 T2V). Renderer already consumes keptModelFiles. node --check passes. Same project_remote_route_branch_audit family. Msg resolved.

Phase 5 CORRECTED: keep-uninstall was still deleting per-model custom_nodes (PainterI2Vadvanced) via the type!=custom_nodes carve-out, dropping I2V to partial after a keep. Removed carve-out: !deleteFiles keeps ALL volume deps. Linked to MPI-95 partial-bar fix.

Phase 6: wrapperFetch reachability resilience. Live bug: Uninstall did nothing, console /comfy/models/check 502 Bad Gateway on a no-GPU Pod. wrapperFetch retried only 404; transient proxy 502/503/504 fell through -> shared-dep guard safe-aborted uninstall + re-sync failed silently -> restart-only workaround. Fix: retry 502/503/504 too (routes/remoteModels.js); real 4xx/501 still surface. node --check passes. Memory project_wrapper_fetch_502_retry added.

Phase 6 expanded. Live log proved 502/404 = Pod RESUMING from warm-stop (wrapper warming 20-60s). (a) retry 502/503/504 not just 404; (b) retry budget 8s->30s; (c) CRITICAL: remote-uninstall-unavailable now a ui:warning TOAST not ui:error MpiErrorDialog (which had a REPORT ON GITHUB button -> junk issues for a benign warm-up). Backend tags reason:wrapper-unreachable + honest copy. Files: remoteModels.js, downloadManager.js, downloadService.js. node --check passes. Memory updated.

Live-verified PASS on a no-GPU Pod: 4 concurrent installs (2 video + 2 image), shared umt5 fetched once (attach proven), no Download-Failed dialog, all installed. Phase 5 keep/delete + Phase 6 502-retry/toast also verified. Committed 2072dd3. maturity complete, status accepted. (MPI-99 spun off for the separate dialog-doesnt-open-after-install renderer bug.)
Archived from done to tasks/_archived/MPI-97 (mpi-archive cleanup of oldest completed cards).
